```
# Python
__pycache__/
*.pyc
*.pyo
*.pyd
.Python
env/
venv/
.venv/
.ENV
.env
.env.*
.env.local
.python-version
.pytest_cache/
.mypy_cache/
.coverage
htmlcov/

# Logs
*.log

# OS generated files
.DS_Store
.DS_Store?
._*
.Spotlight-V100
.Trashes
ehthumbs.db
Thumbs.db

# Editor files
.vscode/
.idea/
*.swp
*.swo

# Build artifacts
build/
dist/
*.egg-info/
```
